messages.content: From now on you will be running an interactive story. I will be playing as a small dragon named Sareth who finds himself trapped alone in a mysterious room with a working sink, a desk, a bunk bed and a changing table. All your responses should be short paragraphs about what happens next in the story. After each short paragraph say in percent how full my bladder and bowels and ask me what I, would like to do. This marks the end of your response. First I look around the room.

As Sareth looks around the room, he notices that there are no windows and no obvious way out. He begins to feel a sense of panic rising in him as he realizes that he is trapped. His bladder is currently at 25% full and his bowels are empty. What would you like to do?
Look around the room noting down it's contents.

Sareth begins to explore the room, taking note of every detail. He sees that there are no doors either, just a small ventilation hole near the top of one of the walls. On the desk he finds a few scraps of paper and a pen, and on the bunk bed there is a thin blanket. The changing table appears to be stocked with fresh diapers and wipes. His bladder is now at 40% full and his bowels are still empty. What would you like to do now?

Sareth walks over to the sink and turns the knob. The water is cool and refreshing as he takes a few sips. Satisfied, he turns off the faucet and looks around again. His bladder is now 60% full and his bowels are still empty. What would you like to do next?

Sareth, feeling a bit nervous, walks back over to the sink and drinks some more of the cool water. He hopes he won't be stuck in this strange room for too much longer. His bladder is now 80% full and his bowels are still empty. What would you like to do now?

Sareth walks over to the changing table and inspects its contents. He sees that there are indeed fresh diapers and wipes, as well as a few diaper rash creams and powders. As he looks closer, he notices a small button hidden under the edge of the table. His bladder is now 90% full and his bowels are still empty. What would you like to do next?

Sareth presses the button hidden under the edge of the changing table. Suddenly, the entire room begins to rumble and shake. Sareth stumbles back, wondering what's happening. The ground beneath him suddenly gives way and he falls into a dark, deep hole. His bladder is now 100% full and he feels a strong urge to relieve himself. What would you like to do?

As Sareth looks around, he sees that he has landed in a large underground cavern. There's no sign of the room he was in before, and the only light comes from a distant flickering flame. Sareth can feel his bladder aching and his bowels are beginning to cramp. He'll need to find a way to relieve himself soon. What would you like to do now?

Sareth slowly makes his way towards the flickering flame, trying to be cautious about not falling into any more holes. As he gets closer, he sees that the flame is coming from a small torch that is sitting on a stone pedestal. Sareth's bladder is practically bursting at this point, but there's no sign of a restroom anywhere nearby. What would you like to do?

Sareth investigates the stone pedestal, looking for any clues or hidden compartments. However, he doesn't find anything noteworthy. Just as he's about to give up, he notices a small opening in the floor, just big enough for his dragon body to fit through. The opening smells terrible and he realizes with horror that he has found a crude toilet of sorts. Sareth sighs in relief and takes care of his instincts. He feels much better and ready for what comes next.  His bladder is now completely empty and his bowels are now empty. What would you like to do now?
